label: CIS Safeguard 1.5
title: Use a Passive Asset Discovery Tool

prose.en: Use a passive discovery tool to identify assets connected to the enterprise's network. Review and use scans to update the enterprise's asset inventory at least weekly, or more frequently.
A passive discovery tool is used to identify assets connected to the enterprise's network.
The scans are reviewed and used to update the enterprise's asset inventory at least weekly, or more frequently.
